evals.prompt: what decisions have we made on the eventstore project
evals.notes: Exercises the superseded pair: idx 7 (Elasticsearch) was reversed by idx 8 (Postgres FTS). Both must appear or the reversal must be flagged. No decisions older than 30d should leak in unless month window used.

evals.notes: Only the HMAC-SHA256 decision (idx 6, 1d old) is within 7d for auth. Should not include warehouse or sam decisions.
